description: Implementation of all 12 pages for the Aurentia Agency website: /a-propos, /realisations, /realisations/[slug], /conciergeries (refonte), /sites-vitrines, /identite-visuelle, /saas, /landing-pages, /formation, /apport-affaires, /cgv, /mentions-legales, /politique-confidentialite. Each page follows the PRD specs in the prd/ folder.

userStories.title: About page — data file + types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the about-content.ts data file with all TypeScript interfaces and content so that the About page components can consume structured data
acceptanceCriteria: File src/data/about-content.ts exists with all interfaces: TeamMember, ValueCard, ProofStat, ApproachPillar, HackathonCard, FatherSonBlock
All content from PRD-A-PROPOS.md is populated (team bios, values, stats, hackathons, father-son blocks)
Exports: teamMembers, valueCards, proofStats, approachPillars, hackathonCards, fatherSonBlocks, audienceItems arrays
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read prd/PRD-A-PROPOS.md for exact content. All text in French. Use Lucide icon names as strings.

AboutStory component in src/components/about/AboutStory.tsx renders 3 paragraphs with BlurReveal stagger and TextGradientReveal on first sentences
H1 text: 'L'IA comme instrument de précision. 20 ans d'expertise comme fondation.'
Responsive: text-3xl mobile → text-5xl md:text-6xl desktop
Uses semantic tokens (text-foreground, bg-background), no hardcoded colors
All transitions >= 500ms ease-in-out
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read prd/PRD-A-PROPOS.md Section 1 + 2. Reuse existing TextReveal, BlurReveal, TextGradientReveal from src/components/animations/.
